rationale: The citing paper references Ho, Lim, and Camerer (2006) only as a general review of behavioral economics and to note that learning to equilibrium is a broader research issue. The core theoretical development, hypotheses, and empirical tests are built on Sarvary and Parker (1997) and related information-pricing work, not on specific constructs or methods from Ho et al. There is no direct borrowing of a model, measure, or analytical framework from the cited paper.
